scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'release' | Out-Null; Remove-Item 'release/youtube-mix-blocker-chrome-*.zip' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Compress-Archive -Path 'dist/*' -DestinationPath 'release/youtube-mix-blocker-chrome-1.5.3.zip'"
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'release' | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem 'release' -Filter 'youtube-mix-blocker-firefox-*.zip' | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^youtube-mix-blocker-firefox-[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)*\.zip$' } | Remove-Item -Force" && npx web-ext build --source-dir dist-firefox --artifacts-dir release --filename youtube-mix-blocker-firefox-1.5.1.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build:firefox && npx web-ext lint --source-dir dist-firefox
scripts.check: npm run build:all && node --check scripts/build-content.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-chrome-locales.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-locales.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release.mjs && node --check dist/content.js && node --check dist/background.js && node --check dist/popup/popup.js && node --check dist-firefox/content.js && node --check dist-firefox/background.js && node --check dist-firefox/popup/popup.js
